name: Brand Kit
description: Create lightweight brand assets and launch metadata for a project. Use when Codex needs to give a repo, product, or skill a simple visual identity with a logo direction, banner ideas, social preview copy, and short positioning text.
short_description: Lightweight visual identity and launch metadata for projects.
audience: Solo builders preparing a repo, app, or skill for sharing
Launch operators who need consistent copy and visual direction
Teams turning rough product language into reusable brand assets
detail_lines: Turns a project name, audience, and current tone into one reusable brand direction instead of a pile of disconnected options.
Produces practical launch artifacts: positioning, compact color direction, logo concept, README or page headline, meta description, and social preview text.
Keeps the workflow local-first and prompt-driven, with no hidden network calls, account tokens, or persistent brand database.
